Applying to 11011000
Input
0 1
1 1
2 0
3 1
4 1
5 0
6 0
7 0
Output
0 C1 = 1
1 C1 = 1
2 C1 = 1
3 NOT0 = NOT(1) = 0
4 NOT1 = NOT(1) = 0
5 NOT2 = NOT(0) = 1
6 OR-NOT03 = OR(1,NOT(1)) = 1
7 OR-NOT14 = OR(1,NOT(1)) = 1

\boxed{11100111}
